content.text: Task list has been updated with 5 item(s).

task_list.title: Extend SYsULexer.tokens to include all new token types
Extend SYsULexer.cpp clang->antlr mapping to cover new tokens
Rewrite SYsUParser.g4 with full C-like grammar (precedence ladder, void/const, if/else, while, break/continue, function call, multiplicative, relational, equality, logical, etc.)

Extend Ast2Asg.{hpp,cpp} to handle new expressions (multiplicative/relational/equality/logical/parens/calls/index/unary !), statements (if/while/break/continue), declarations (void, const, function params)
Iteratively fix failing cases until task2-score is maxed
